description_long: This is a handmade-style rag doll with a soft, light blue dress that reaches down to its feet. The doll has beige, yarn-like hair styled in a straight, shoulder-length cut, and its face features two large purple button eyes, a stitched black mouth, and a small stitched nose. The arms and legs are simple, cylindrical, and appear to be made from a soft fabric, with the hands and feet in a lighter beige color. A small blue bow is attached to the left side of the hair, adding a playful touch. The back of the dress is plain, and the overall construction suggests a plush, squeezable body. The name "KIRA" is written on the underside of the right foot, giving the doll a personalized detail.
description: A soft rag doll with a light blue dress, button eyes, and beige yarn hair, featuring a blue bow and stitched facial details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's button eyes, stitched mouth, blue dress, and blue hair bow.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the yarn hair and the profile of the face and dress.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain back of the dress and the full shape of the yarn hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, arm, and the volume of the hair.
attribute_clothing_style: Simple, long-sleeved, light blue dress with a plain design, reminiscent of classic handmade rag dolls; no visible patterns or brand influences.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended outward at a slight downward angle, legs straight and close together, and the head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with a stitched black mouth, two large purple button eyes, and no visible eyebrows, giving a calm and slightly whimsical appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Shoulder-length, straight, light blonde yarn hair with a side part and a blue bow on the left side.
